column1: # Dark photon (A') branching ratios from DeLiVeR (VMD + PDG R-ratio)
# Model: kinetic mixing portal (EM charges x e per SM fermion)
# scipy>=1.14 compat: scipy.integrate.quadrature replaced by quad with scalar-wrap
# Coverage: 0.20 -- 1.70 GeV (VMD non-perturbative). Above ~1.7 GeV use perturbative QCD.
#   tau      : BR(A' -> tau+ tau-)  [zero below 2*m_tau = 3.554 GeV]
#   pi4c     : BR(A' -> pi+ pi+ pi- pi-)
#   pi4n     : BR(A' -> pi0 pi0 pi+ pi-)
#   had_other: BR into remaining hadronic channels (sum of minor modes)
#   BRqcd    : total hadronic BR (= sum of all had channels below 1.7 GeV)
